title: Chronik-Ledger-Snapshot bei ungültigem UTF-8 bytegenau binden
goal: Den Ledger-Snapshot aus Chronik PR #220 auch bei ungültigem UTF-8 an die tatsächlich gelesenen Rohbytes bis zur letzten vollständigen JSONL-Zeile binden, ohne historische Semantik, v1-Ausgabeformate oder das fail-closed Einfrieren zu verändern.

acceptance.assertion: ledger_snapshot.sha256 is computed from the original bytes that were scanned, bounded at the last complete JSONL line, including when a record contains invalid UTF-8.
Snapshot hash, complete byte boundary, parsed records and integrity diagnostics derive from one coherent read and cannot silently describe different file states.
Tests cover invalid UTF-8, malformed JSON and incomplete tails, including byte sequences that would collapse to identical Unicode replacement text after decoding.
Valid UTF-8 ledgers retain existing query, summary and freeze results and the public chronik-coding-history.v1, chronik-operator-summary.v1 and chronik-history-cohort-receipt.v1 identifiers.
freeze continues to refuse a cohort whenever the bounded ledger snapshot contains invalid records, while read-only history exposes bounded diagnostics.
Task metadata preserves the originating live-register event, Chronik PR and merge commit.
